privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: CarbonTrack is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and safeguard your data in accordance with the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (Cap. 486) of Hong Kong ("PDPO") and the EU General Data Protection Regulation ("GDPR").

identity.title: 1. Identity and Scope
identity.content1: This Privacy Policy applies to the CarbonTrack platform ("Service"), operated by CarbonTrack from Hong Kong SAR. We provide our services to users globally.
identity.content2: For the purposes of the GDPR, CarbonTrack is the Data Controller of your personal information.

collection.title: 2. Information We Collect
collection.intro: We collect information only when "lawful and fair" (PDPO DPP1) and necessary for our services:
items: Account Information: Username, email address, and encrypted password (for account creation and authentication).
Activity Data: Details of your carbon-saving activities, uploaded images (via user submission), and impact calculations.
Technical Data: IP address, browser type, device information, and usage statistics (via cookies and analytics) to optimize our platform.

usage.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
usage.intro: We process your data based on the following legal grounds (GDPR Art. 6):
items: Contractual Necessity: To provide carbon tracking features, calculate your impact, and maintain your account.
Legitimate Interests: To improve our services, ensure security, and prevent fraud.
Consent: For optional features (e.g., marketing newsletters, voluntary surveys). You may withdraw consent at any time.
usage.marketing: Direct Marketing: We will not use your personal data for direct marketing without your explicit consent or request (PDPO Part 6A).

storage.title: 4. Data Storage and International Transfers
storage.content1: CarbonTrack is based in Hong Kong. Your data is primarily processed and stored on secure servers located in Hong Kong and via global cloud service providers (e.g., Cloudflare).
storage.content2: For international data transfers (including those from the EU/EEA), we implement appropriate protective measures to ensure your data security in compliance with applicable laws.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights
rights.intro: Regardless of your location, we grant you the following rights, combining the protections of PDPO and GDPR:
items: Right to Access & Correction: You can request a copy of your data and correct inaccuracies (PDPO DPP6).
Right to Erasure ("Right to be Forgotten"): You may request deletions of your account and data (GDPR).
Right to Restrict Processing: You can ask us to suspend processing of your data in certain scenarios details.
Right to Data Portability: You can request your data in a structured, commonly used format.
Right to Object: You can object to processing based on legitimate interests or for direct marketing.
rights.contact: To exercise these rights, please contact our Data Protection Officer at: {{email}}. We will respond to valid requests within the statutory timeframe (usually 40 days for PDPO, 30 days for GDPR).

retention.title: 6. Data Retention and Security
retention.content1: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, or as required by law.
retention.content2: We employ industry-standard security measures (encryption, transport layer security) to protect against unauthorized access, processing, or loss (PDPO DPP4). While no system is 100% secure, we are committed to promptly addressing and reporting any security breaches in accordance with best practices and applicable laws.

contact.title: 7. Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Please read these terms carefully before using the CarbonTrack platform. By accessing or using our service, you agree to be bound by these terms.

agreement.title: 1. Agreement to Terms
agreement.content1: These Terms of Service ("Terms") constitute a legally binding agreement made between you, whether personally or on behalf of an entity ("you") and CarbonTrack ("we," "us," or "our"), regarding your access to and use of our website and services.
agreement.content2: CarbonTrack is operated from Hong Kong SAR.

responsibility.title: 2. User Responsibilities & Conduct
responsibility.intro: You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes. You are strictly prohibited from:
items: Violating any applicable local, state, national, or international law or regulation.

Doxxing & Harassment: Engaing in any form of cyberbullying, harassment, or "doxxing" (revealing private personal information of others without consent). We have a zero-tolerance policy towards such behavior, consistent with the Personal Data (Privacy) (Amendment) Ordinance 2021.
Impersonating any person or entity or falsely stating your affiliation.
Interfering with or disrupting the security, integrity, or performance of the Service.

ip.title: 3. Intellectual Property
ip.content: The Service and its original content (excluding content provided by users), features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of CarbonTrack and its licensors. The Service is protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws of both Hong Kong and foreign countries.

liability.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, CarbonTrack shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, resulting from (i) your access to or use of or inability to access or use the Service; (ii) any conduct or content of any third party on the Service.

law.title: 5. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
law.content1: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of Hong Kong SAR, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
law.content2: Any dispute, controversy, difference, or claim arising out of or relating to this Agreement, including the existence, validity, interpretation, performance, breach, or termination thereof, shall be referred to and determined by arbitration in Hong Kong or the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Hong Kong SAR.

changes.title: 6. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.

contact.title: 7. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at: {{email}}.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how CarbonTrack uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website.

what.title: 1. What are Cookies?
what.content: Cookies are small data files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit a website. They are widely used by website owners in order to make their websites work, or to work more efficiently, as well as to provide reporting information.

how.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
how.intro: We use cookies for the following purposes:

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.desc: These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with services available through our website and to use some of its features, such as access to secure areas (e.g., login sessions).

performance.title: Performance & Analytics Cookies
performance.desc: These cookies collect information that is used either in aggregate form to help us understand how our website is being used or how effective our marketing campaigns are, or to help us customize our website for you.

functionality.title: Functionality Cookies
functionality.desc: These cookies allow our website to remember choices you make (such as your username, language or the region you are in) and provide enhanced, more personal features.

thirdParty.title: 3. Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.intro: In addition to our own cookies, we may also use various third-parties cookies to report usage statistics of the Service, deliver advertisements on and through the Service, and so on.
items: Google Analytics: We use Google Analytics to measure how you interact with our website to improve your experience.
Cloudflare: Used for security and performance optimization.

managing.title: 4. Managing Cookies
managing.content1: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can exercise your cookie rights by setting your browser controls to accept or refuse cookies. If you choose to reject cookies, you may still use our website though your access to some functionality and areas of our website may be restricted.
managing.content2: As the means by which you can refuse cookies through your web browser controls vary from browser-to-browser, you should visit your browser's help menu for more information.

updates.title: 5. Updates to This Policy
updates.content: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time in order to reflect, for example, changes to the cookies we use or for other operational, legal or regulatory reasons. Please therefore re-visit this Cookie Policy regularly to stay informed about our use of cookies and related technologies.

security.title: Security Overview
security.subtitle: Your security is our top priority.

commitment.title: 1. Our Commitment
commitment.content: CarbonTrack is committed to protecting your data. We employ industry-standard technical and organizational measures to safeguard your information against unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction.

infrastructure.title: 2. Infrastructure Security
infrastructure.intro: Our infrastructure is built on world-class cloud providers with rigorous security certifications (e.g., ISO 27001, SOC 2).
items: Data Centre Security: We use secure data centers with 24/7 monitoring.
Encryption: Data is encrypted in transit using TLS 1.2+ and at rest using AES-256 encryption.
DDoS Protection: We utilize Cloudflare to protect against Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks.

app.title: 3. Application Security
items: Account Protection: We hash passwords using strong algorithms (e.g., Argon2/Bcrypt). We never store passwords in plain text.
Access Controls: Internal access to data is strictly limited to authorized personnel on a need-to-know basis.
Regular Audits: We conduct regular code reviews and security audits to identify and fix vulnerabilities.

vuln.title: 4. Vulnerability Reporting
vuln.intro: If you believe you have found a security vulnerability in CarbonTrack, please let us know immediately. We appreciate your assistance in making our platform safer.
vuln.contact: Please submit your report to {{email}}.
items: Do not exploit the vulnerability to access data that does not belong to you.
We will acknowledge receipt of your report promptly.
We aim to resolve critical issues within 72 hours.

breach.title: 5. Data Breach Notification
breach.content: In the event of a personal data breach that is likely to result in a high risk to your rights and freedoms, we will notify you and the relevant supervisory authorities within 72 hours of becoming aware of the breach, in accordance with GDPR and pending Hong Kong legislative best practices.
